zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Sherburne於1402年11月1日出生在英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特時，她的父親Richard Sherburne21歲，母親Agnes Harington11歲。她於1445年4月16日與John de Townley在英國英格蘭藍卡爾華拉利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1462年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Sherburne于1402年11月1日出生在英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特时，她的父亲Richard Sherburne21岁，母亲Agnes Harington11岁。她于1445年4月16日与John de Townley在英国英格兰藍卡爾華拉利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1462年在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sherburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of several places called with Old English scīr ‘bright, clear’ + burna ‘stream’, including Sherburn in Elmet (Yorkshire), Sherburn (East Yorkshire, Durham), Shirburn (Oxfordshire), Sherborne (Dorset, Gloucestershire), Sherborne Saint John, Monk Sherborne (Hampshire), Sherbourne (Warwickshire), Sherbourne in Albury (Surrey), and Sherborne in Litton (Somerset). This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sherbon
meanings: English: variant of Sherburne with loss of the second -r- by dissimilation. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Sherburne was born on 1 November 1402, in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, her father, Richard Sherburne, was 21 and her mother, Agnes Harington, was 11. She married John de Townley on 16 April 1445, in Whalley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1462, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Sherburne est née le 1 novembre 1402, à Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Sherburne, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes Harington, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé John de Townley le 16 avril 1445, à Whalley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1462, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Sherburne am 1. November 1402 in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Sherburne 21 und ihre Mutter Agnes Harington 11. Sie hat am 16. April 1445 in Whalley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom John de Townley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1462 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Sherburne è nata il il 1 novembre 1402 nel Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Richard Sherburne, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Agnes Harington, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato John de Townley il 16 aprile 1445, nel Whalley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1462, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Sherburneが1402年11月1日にイギリスランカシュアイアストニーハルストで生まれた時，父Richard Sherburneは21歳，母Agnes Haringtonは11歳であった。1445年4月16日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウアリーでJohn de Townleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1462年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Sherburne(이)가 1402년 11월 1일 영국 랭카실르 스토니후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Sherburne(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Harington(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1445년 4월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 화알리에서 John de Townley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Sherburne nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1402, em Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Sherburne, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Harington, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Townley em 16 de abril de 1445, em Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1462, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Sherburne родилась 1 ноября 1402 г. в местности стонихурст, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Sherburne было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Harington, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Townley 16 апреля 1445 г. в местности уолли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1462 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Sherburne nació el 1 de noviembre de 1402, en Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Sherburne, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agnes Harington, tenía 11 años. Se casó con John de Townley el 16 de abril de 1445, en Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1462, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
